title: Accident on Louis Fourie near Heiderand Mall
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - An accident took place...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Breaking News","html":"Breaking News"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - An accident took place this evening on Louis Fourie Road at around 18:30, at the intersection near the Heiderand Mall.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - An accident took place this evening on Louis Fourie Road at around 18:30, at the intersection near the Heiderand Mall."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"At least two vehicles were involved. One vehicle has reportedly been flipped on its roof.","html":"At least two vehicles were involved. One vehicle has reportedly been flipped on its roof."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mossel Bay, Fire, Rescue and Disaster Management teams are on the scene.","html":"Mossel Bay, Fire, Rescue and Disaster Management teams are on the scene."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"It is unclear at this stage if anyone has been injured."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mossel Bay Advertiser will update its readers once more information becomes available.","html":"Mossel Bay Advertiser will update its readers once more information becomes available."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This is a developing story.","html":"This is a developing story."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
